testcase.name: Login & Authentication › happy path: login with valid credentials
Login & Authentication › invalid credentials: shows error message
Login & Authentication › empty email: shows validation error
Login & Authentication › empty password: shows validation error
Wallet — Add Bank Details › happy path: add bank details successfully
Wallet — Add Bank Details › validation: submit with empty fields shows errors
Wallet — Add Bank Details › SWIFT autofill: bank name fills in from SWIFT code
Wallet — Add Bank Details › validation: invalid SWIFT code shows error
Wallet — Add Bank Details › modal can be closed without saving
